sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 모건스탠리는 3분기 순매출 182억 달러, EPS 2.80달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 견조한 성장을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 순매출은 182억 달러로 전년 동기 154억 달러 대비 증가했으며, 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.80달러를 기록했습니다.
자산관리 및 투자관리 부문의 총 고객 자산은 8조 9,000억 달러에 달하며 지속적인 성장세를 보였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 기관 증권 부문은 주식 사업의 성과와 투자 은행 활동의 반등에 힘입어 85억 달러의 순매출을 기록했습니다.
자산관리 부문은 810억 달러의 순신규자산 유입과 420억 달러의 수수료 기반 자산 흐름을 기록하며 성장했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 순이익은 46억 달러로 전년 동기 32억 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
투자관리 부문은 17억 달러의 순매출과 165억 달러의 장기 순유입을 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 투자 은행 활동의 반등세가 향후 분기에도 지속되어 전체 실적 성장을 견인할 수 있을지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a3q25msearningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Morgan Stanley Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Results Morgan Stanley Reports Net Revenues of $18.2 Billion, EPS of $2.80 and ROTCE of 23.5% NEW YORK, October 15, 2025 – Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today reported net revenues of $18.2 billion for the third quarter ended September 30, 2025 compared with $15.4 billion a year ago. Net income applicable to Morgan Stanley was $4.6 billion, or $2.80 per diluted share, compared with $3.2 billion, or $1.88 per diluted share, for the same period a year ago. 1 Ted Pick, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, said, “Our Integrated Firm delivered an outstanding quarter with strong performance in each of our businesses globally. Consistent execution of our strategy  Normalized numeric aliases: $18.2 Billion = 182억 달러; $18.2 billion = 182억 달러; $15.4 billion = 154억 달러; $4.6 billion = 46억 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $18.2 = 18.2달러; $2.80 = 2.80달러; $15.4 = 15.4달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러; $4.6 = 4.6달러; $1.88 = 1.88달러.

n $81 billion in net new assets. Institutional Securities results were driven by our Equity business and a rebound in Investment Banking activity. Total client assets across Wealth and Investment Management reached $8.9 trillion. Across our global footprint, we remain committed to generating durable growth to drive long-term value for our shareholders.” Financial Summary notes 2 and 3 Firm ($ millions, except per share data) 3Q 2025 3Q 2024 Net revenues $18,224 $15,383 Provision for credit losses $0 $79 Compensation expense $7,442 $6,733 Non-compensation expenses $4,754 $4,350 Pre-tax inco  Normalized numeric aliases: $81 billion = 810억 달러; $8.9 trillion = 8조 9,000억 달러; $81 = 81달러; $8.9 = 8.9달러; $0 = 0달러; $79 = 79달러; $7,442 = 7,442달러; $6,733 = 6,733달러; $4,350 = 4,350달러; $2.80 = 2.80달러; $43.76 = 43.76달러; 4,754 million = 47억 5,400만 달러; 3,188 million = 31억 8,800만 달러; 4,350 million = 43억 5,000만 달러; 6,028 million = 60억 2,800만 달러; 4,221 million = 42억 2,100만 달러; 4,610 million = 46억 1,000만 달러.

ier 1 capital ratio was 15.2%. 16 • Institutional Securities reported net revenues of $8.5 billion reflecting robust performance in Equity and a rebound in Investment Banking activity. • Wealth Management delivered a pre-tax margin of 30.3% for the quarter. 7 Record net revenues of $8.2 billion reflect our highest asset management revenues, robust levels of client activity and higher net interest income. The business demonstrated continued growth with net new assets of $81 billion and fee-based asset flows of $42 billion for the quarter. notes 10 and 11 • Investment Management results reflect net revenues of $1.7 billion, primarily driven by asset management fees on higher average AUM.
